title: manilkara jaimiqui subsp. emarginata
intro: Manilkara jaimiqui subsp. emarginata, also known as the Jamaican plum or Mayan plum, is a plant species native to the Caribbean and Central America, characterized by its purple or black fruit and edible properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Manilkara jaimiqui subsp. emarginata include its ability to help lower cholesterol levels, improve heart health, and provide relief from digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, and its leaves and bark are also used in herbal remedies, with the fruit being consumed fresh or used in jams and preserves.
